test.name: TC-E2E-02

kw.name: Open Application And Login
Open Application
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens browser and navigate to application page

kw.name: Login
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Logs in user
Opens application and logs in

kw.name: Click Transfer Funds
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the transfer funds link

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Enter Amount
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Enters amount to transfer

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Select From Account
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="fromAccountId"]' by value 13344.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Selects source account from dropdown

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Select To Account
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="toAccountId"]' by value 13566.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Selects destination account from dropdown

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Transfer Button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Clicks the transfer button

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Account Transactions
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/accounts/13566/transactions path_url=/parabank/services/bank/accounts/13566/transactions headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Gets transaction history for an account ID

kw.name: Verify Response Code
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Checks response code

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Validating transaction history contains entry of transfer amount: 120
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Application
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser

test.doc: Verify E2E funds transfer and API transaction history validation
